metadata.name: SuperTeam
metadata.description: Seven-stage delivery plugin with main-session-as-orchestrator architecture and hook-enforced trust chain

plugins.name: superteam
plugins.description: V4.7.0 — moves the Orchestrator role from a subagent (which physically cannot spawn other subagents in Claude Code's runtime) to the main session. Adds a persistent mode.json state machine, hook-level main-session write blocking on substantive work files, append-only spawn-log audit, and three new slash commands (/superteam:go, /superteam:end, /superteam:status). Trust chain is enforced on disk, not by AI self-discipline.
